## Overview

OpenGL function pointer loader implemented in Odin. Supports the `core` profile up to version 4.6.

### [GL\_Enum ¶](#GL_Enum) [*Source*](https://github.com/odin-lang/Odin/tree/master/vendor/OpenGL/enums.odin#L3)

```
GL_Enum :: enum u64 {
	FALSE                                                      = 0, 
	TRUE                                                       = 1, 
	DEPTH_BUFFER_BIT                                           = 256, 
	STENCIL_BUFFER_BIT                                         = 1024, 
	COLOR_BUFFER_BIT                                           = 16384, 
	POINTS                                                     = 0, 
	LINES                                                      = 1, 
	LINE_LOOP                                                  = 2, 
	LINE_STRIP                                                 = 3, 
	TRIANGLES                                                  = 4, 
	TRIANGLE_STRIP                                             = 5, 
	TRIANGLE_FAN                                               = 6, 
	QUADS                                                      = 7, 
	NEVER                                                      = 512, 
	LESS                                                       = 513, 
	EQUAL                                                      = 514, 
	LEQUAL                                                     = 515, 
	GREATER                                                    = 516,

### [Shader\_Type ¶](#Shader_Type) [*Source*](https://github.com/odin-lang/Odin/tree/master/vendor/OpenGL/helpers.odin#L14)

```
Shader_Type :: enum i32 {
	NONE                   = 0, 
	FRAGMENT_SHADER        = 35632, 
	VERTEX_SHADER          = 35633, 
	GEOMETRY_SHADER        = 36313, 
	COMPUTE_SHADER         = 37305,
